testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'LM0002308', ip: '2405:201:21:5099:d889:1c4e:68a5:8db0%en0'
